knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-031-Notification-Escalation Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: NT-016 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: NT-001 Notification source approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Notification source approval | Critical | Platform. NT-002 Recipient validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Recipient validation | Critical | Platform. NT-003 Channel approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Channel approval | Critical | Platform. NT-004 Severity mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Severity mapping | Critical | Platform. NT-005 Escalation chain | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | Critical | Platform. NT-006 Acknowledgment | Governance | Require documented compliance: Acknowledgment | Critical | Platform. NT-007 Delivery tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Delivery tracking | Critical | Platform. NT-008 Retry policy | Governance | Require documented compliance: Retry policy | Critical | Platform. NT-009 Emergency broadcast authority | Governance | Require documented compliance: Emergency broadcast authority | Critical | Platform. NT-010 Sensitive content masking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Sensitive content masking | Critical | Platform. NT-011 Opt-out policy | Governance | Require documented compliance: Opt-out policy | Critical | Platform. NT-012 Time-zone handling | Governance | Require documented compliance: Time-zone handling | Critical | Platform. NT-013 Duplicate suppression | Governance | Require documented compliance: Duplicate suppression | Critical | Platform. NT-014 Rate limiting | Governance | Require documented compliance: Rate limiting | Critical | Platform. NT-015 AI message approval | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI message approval | Critical | AI Governance. NT-016 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. NT-017 Fallback channel | Governance | Require documented compliance: Fallback channel | High | Platform. NT-018 On-call schedule | Governance | Require documented compliance: On-call schedule | High | Platform. NT-019 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Platform. NT-020 Template versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Template versioning | High | Platform. NT-021 Delivery evidence | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Delivery evidence | High | Platform. NT-022 Failed-delivery escalation | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | High | Platform. NT-023 Quiet hours | Governance | Require documented compliance: Quiet hours | High | Platform. NT-024 Legal retention | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Legal retention | High | Platform. NT-025 Disaster recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Platform.
